name: getMonitorHistory
description: Get alert history for a monitor from the public /v2/monitors/{id}/history endpoint. Use the checkMonitors() tool to list all monitors.

monitorId.description: The monitor ID. You can find an list of monitors using the `checkMonitors()` tool.

startTime.description: Start time for the query range. A fixed (RFC3339) or relative (now, now-5m) time value. Defaults to "now-30m".

endTime.description: End time for the query range. A fixed (RFC3339) or relative (now, now-5m) time value. Defaults to "now".
